name: Prosciutto and Fig Handrolls
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 arugula leaves, rinsed and patted dry
2 oz (1/2 package) daikon sprouts or bean sprouts -- rinsed and patted dry
3 fresh figs (Black Mission), thinly sliced -- (18 total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the balsamic vinegar and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Lay 1 slice of prosciutto flat on your work surface with a long edge facing you.
3. Place an arugula leaf and some daikon sprouts on the left-hand side of the prosciutto. They should stick out over the top edge of the prosciutto by about 1 inch.
4. Lay 3 fig strips and a mushroom slice on the sprouts.
5. Sprinkle with some of the balsamic vinaigrette.
6. Roll up the prosciutto into a cone.
7. Repeat with the remaining ingredients.
8. Arrange the handrolls on a serving platter and serve at once. Serves 6.
